name: the runner emits a SARIF 2.1.0 error result when a required tool is absent
command: printf 'x\n' > f.md && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool checkov --file f.md --required --json > s.sarif 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("s.sarif","utf8"));if(j.version!=="2.1.0")process.exit(1);if(j.runs[0].results[0].level!=="error")process.exit(1)' && echo sarif-error 1>&2
